title: Ortholoma calotrichum
taxonomy: Ortholoma calotrichum is classified within the family Apocynaceae and the genus Ortholoma. This plant is native to South America and is further classified as a species of flowering plant. The classification of Ortholoma calotrichum is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, clade Asterids, order Gentianales, family Apocynaceae, genus Ortholoma, species O. calotrichum. The specific classification of this plant may be subject to change as new research emerges. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification of Ortholoma calotrichum.
